summary: Lane L10N-003 complete. Created a standalone Bun script at packages/app/script/stub-locales.ts that auto-generates locale stubs for missing i18n keys. The script reads en.ts (971 keys), compares each of the 17 locale files, and inserts [LANG] markers with // TODO: translate comments. Added a stub-locales script entry to packages/app/package.json. All locales already have 100% key parity (verified by 20/20 parity tests), so the script is ready for future en.ts additions. No locale files were modified — the guardrails (don't touch existing values, don't modify parity test, don't touch fallback) are all preserved.
